text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek and Narita Taishin are going out to
look for some everyday training shoes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek asks for my help choosing the right
shoes, so I end up joining them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
So why are you tagging along again? I wanted to
go on my own.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Oh, don't be like that. It just so happened
that I wanted to go shopping myself.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We are roommates, after all. We might as well go
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then would you care to explain why your
trainer's also here?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I figured we'd need a second opinion when
choosing training shoes, and who's more reliable
than Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch, whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mall is packed with people. We squeeze past
the shoppers and notice a change in our numbers.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hm? Where's Taishin?
choice_data_list: Did she get separated from us?
Did she get separated from us?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Gosh, what do we do?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin... I should've held your hand.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's feeling sad and lonely. We need to
find her right away.
choice_data_list: Let's split up and look for her.

Let's request a lost-person announcement on
the PA system.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll go that way. Let's meet back here later.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hang in there, Taishin! I'm coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek sprints off, weaving deftly through
the crowds in search of Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thirty minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm so glad I found you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can't believe you seriously came looking for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You could've just left me to wander around when
we got separated. I'm not a kid.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm a little more out of breath than usual
since I was frantically paying attention to my
surroundings as I ran.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm okay now. Shall we resume together, Taishin?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Siiiigh... Fine. I'll stay close, okay? Sheesh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles with the resigned Narita
Taishin following behind. She appears to have
learned something from this experience.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's a wonderful idea! We should go and
request one right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bing, bong, bing! ♪

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Thank you again for shopping with us today.
We'd like to ask for everyone's cooperation in
finding a lost child.

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Her name is Narita Taishin. She has short hair and
was last seen wearing a Tracen Academy uniform.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've gotten the announcement out, I'm
sure that Taishin will—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the hell was that for?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Thank goodness we've found you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Thank goodness, my butt! What is all this?! Who
are you calling a lost child?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I wasn't lost! I was just pretending to get separated from you guys!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Really?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well aren't you a little prankster today! But
no more funny business, okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I wasn't trying to be funny!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, be good. Here, let me hold your hand
so you don't get lost again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Are you even listening to me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Narita Taishin droops her shoulders in
defeat and offers her hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek smiles, appearing to have learned
something from the experience.
